quote: Out of all the technologies I've seen in my time here, this system makes the most sense!

quote: It makes me so happy … in such a short time you’re able to gauge all this information and being able to support us. I think you’re not one step ahead, you guys are like 2-3 steps ahead and, I think some of the things you’re saying, I didn’t even know I needed, but now I’m convinced I need those.

quote: I'm so impressed by how this team has stuck to our very ambitious timeline of having the POC complete by December/January. Well done!

quote: Just submitted part 1 of my Mass PFML application for #FamilyLeave (easy+fast)! Can't wait to finally afford to take 12 weeks just being a dad, because on 1/1/21, new parents in Massachusets can get paid leave to bond with our kid!
name: Early MA Paid Family Leave user
